/CAL: SENTENCE/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 90 D/CTS: 33/WS/DNACOMP/IND/SA1:WILLIE SCOTT JUNIOR, GREGORY WILLIAMS, PALLAVI SUD, XINGYI GUI/SA2: 325 OCTAVIA ST AND 1475 FILLMORE ST, SF/SAORD/X:RESTITUTION FROM CASE 13013138IS TRANSFERRED TO PROBATION IN THIS CASE VIA HARVEY WAIVER,/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:PRELIM HRG/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:01-27-16/ARBUCKLE/DOP/REMA/X:THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN COURT NO, 13013138 & 15027310 AS FOLLOWS:PAY RESTITUTION AS DETERMINED BY APD & ABIDE BY PROTECTIVEORDERS/

/CAL:PRELIM HRG/DEF:ENTERED A GUILTY PLEA IN THE MORNING, A NEW CASE WAS ONFOR ARRAIGNMENT IN THE AFTERNOON, THE GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE, HOWEVER WHEN GUILTY PLEA ENTERED THE RIGHT TO A SPEEDY PRELIMINARY  HEARING WAS WAIVED/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
